data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Stephanie Duran Discusses Outdoor Access in Santa Fe
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Santa Fe, New Mexico, Stephanie Duran from Veritas Real Estate Partners discussed the significance of being close to nature when selecting a residence in the area. In an article on HelloNation, Duran emphasized the allure of having easy access to trails, ski slopes, and the picturesque surroundings of Santa Fe.

data.title: Netcapital Reports Third Quarter Fiscal 2026 Financial Results and Provides Corporate Update
data.description: Boston-based Netcapital Inc. (Nasdaq: NCPL, NCPLW) revealed their financial data for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 that concluded on January 31, 2026. The company, recognized for its digital private capital markets platform, is set to host a business update conference call on March 20, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The event aims to provide further insight into their recent performance and corporate highlights.

data.title: Gemini shares surge after hours as investors support shift beyond crypto trading, despite declining trading volumes.
data.description: Investors are increasingly interested in transitioning towards more stable revenue streams and expanding into prediction markets. This comes as trading volumes experienced a decrease.

data.title: Freight Technologies Releases Pro Forma Financial Statements for JAK Solar Acquisition
data.description: On March 19, 2026, Freight Technologies, Inc. (Nasdaq: FRGT) unveiled unaudited pro forma financial statements post its acquisition of JAK Solar Loans 1 Limited ("JAK Solar") finalized on December 31, 2025. Fr8Tech, recognized for its innovative logistics management, presented these statements showcasing the financial impact of the acquisition. This move by the company signifies its strategic expansion into solar financing, broadening its technological solutions portfolio. The acquisition plays a vital role in the company's growth trajectory, reflecting its commitment to diversification and adaptability within the evolving market landscape. With this new addition, Freight Technologies, Inc. aims to leverage synergies, enhance market positioning, and capture emerging opportunities in both the logistics and solar financing sectors.

data.title: SEC chair supports crypto regulation clarity through legislation, with hint of market bill deferment.
data.description: The chair of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) indicated that the agency is willing to defer to a market structure bill proposed by Congress. However, there is a need for a transitional arrangement, referred to as a "bridge," to provide clarity on regulations surrounding cryptocurrencies.

data.title: BPI raises concerns over KY crypto bill allowing access to hardware wallets, risking self-custody of Bitcoin.
data.description: The trade group highlighted that certain clauses in the state legislation go against the fundamental principles and value proposition of Bitcoin as an asset that individuals can possess in their own custody.

data.title: California Grand Casino Honored as Best Local Casino by the East Bay Times -- 11 Time Winner
data.description: In Pacheco, California, on March 19, 2026, California Grand Casino has been recognized as the Best Local Casino in the San Francisco East Bay, as voted by readers of the East Bay Times and Bay Area News Group. This marks the 11th occasion that the renowned casino has secured this esteemed title.

data.title: FCPT Announces Acquisition of a Panera Bread Property for $3.8 Million
data.description: Based in Mill Valley, California, Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT), a real estate investment trust focusing on owning and acquiring premium, net-leased restaurant and retail properties, has successfully purchased a Panera Bread property in Kentucky for $3.8 million. Situated in a bustling area with high foot traffic, the property is under a corporate-operated triple net lease, offering around six years of lease term remaining.
